title: Once Upon a Christmas Crown
overview: Princess Charlotte of Marovia, soon to be crowned Queen, escapes the palace to pursue her passion for cooking. In a charming New England town, she enters a Christmas baking contest under an alias, where she finds love—and the courage to embrace her true self.
